text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And now, the scavenger hunt is officially
underway! The runner currently in the lead is...
Graaaah!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Stop chasing meee! Ticket's mine for the taking!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: No waaay! I already have dibs on her!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, no, nooo! Calm down, please! You two
shouldn't be fighting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chomp!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Gyaaaah! Did she just bite me?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: I need "a black-haired Umamusume from a different dorm"!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: So Ticket's coming with me! That's final!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Owie... She's not the only one with black hair!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Ticket's a "peppy upperclassman," so she's
coming with me! Plus, she raised her hand when I
called her!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hehe, when you called me peppy, I got so happy!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Well, when I think Ticket, I think black hair, and
when I think black hair, I think Ticket! And we're
in the same class, so she instantly came to mind!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
NO WAY! You really mean that? I'm so, so...
HAPPYYY!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gosh, I want to go with the both of you!

text_block_list.name: Turbo & Windy
text_block_list.text: That's it!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Why didn't we think of this before? We can all cross the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: All right, let's get going! First place is ours!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So there is a way! You can both count on meee!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: What?! Is that even allowed?!

text_block_list.name: The Three
text_block_list.text: We made iiiiit!
